export const NOTE_COLORS = [
  { name: "Vang nhat", value: "#FFE4B5" },
  { name: "Xanh duong", value: "#B5E4FF" },
  { name: "Hong", value: "#FFB5E4" },
  { name: "Xanh la", value: "#B5FFE4" },
  { name: "Tim", value: "#E4B5FF" },
  { name: "Cam", value: "#FFD4B5" },
  { name: "Xam", value: "#E0E0E0" },
  { name: "Do nhat", value: "#FFB5B5" },
  { name: "Xanh navy", value: "#B5D4FF" },
  { name: "Hong dam", value: "#FFB5D4" },
];
